content.situation: 同事帮你快速整理完一份紧急报告，你向他表达真诚感谢
content.speakerText: I really appreciate you staying late to help me finish this report.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你留下来帮我完成这份报告。
content.responseTemplate: ___, I couldn't have done it without you.
content.hint: 回应感谢时，常用表达是表示不客气，同时认可对方的帮助
content.knowledgePoint: 回应真诚感谢的标准表达

content.situation: 朋友帮你找到了丢失的钥匙，你对他表示由衷感谢
content.speakerText: Thanks so much for helping me find my keys—I was so stressed!
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢你帮我找到钥匙了，我之前急死了！
content.responseTemplate: ___! I'm just glad I could help.
content.hint: 在对方用 'Thanks so much' 表达强烈感谢时，最自然的回应是轻松、友好的短语
content.knowledgePoint: 回应强烈感谢的常用口语表达

content.situation: 邻居帮你搬重物上楼，你对他表达感激之情
content.speakerText: I really appreciate you taking the time to help me with these boxes.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你抽出时间帮我搬这些箱子。
content.responseTemplate: ___, I'm always happy to lend a hand.
content.hint: 当对方强调你花时间帮忙时，回应中应体现‘随时愿意帮忙’的态度
content.knowledgePoint: 表达乐于助人的习惯性回应
